name: Red Canyon Resources Ltd.
description: Red Canyon Resources Ltd. is a geoscience-driven mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-quality copper and gold projects in North America. Headquartered in Canada and listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange, the company leverages an experienced team of geoscientists and capital market experts to identify and advance drill-ready assets. By targeting premier copper districts in British Columbia and the Western United States, Red Canyon Resources aims to capitalize on the growing global demand for copper, which is essential for the electrification of energy and transport industries.
